context_text: "Run fast," said the Scarecrow to the Lion, "and get out of this deadly flower bed as soon as you can.
normalized_context_text: "Run fast," said the Scarecrow to the Lion, "and get out of this deadly flower bed as soon as you can.
original_context_text: "Run fast," said the Scarecrow to the Lion, "and get out of [[this deadly flower bed]] as soon as you can.
rendered_context_text: "Run fast," said the Scarecrow to the Lion, "and get out of this deadly flower bed as soon as you can.
subject: the poppy bed

context_text: Soon they rolled the Lion out of the poppy bed to the green fields, where he could breathe the sweet, fresh air again, instead of the poisonous scent of the flowers.
